uplink.description: Weather + rain frame (fPort 2): rainfall, temperature, humidity, pressure, illuminance
uplink._note: Synthetic frame built to the Dragino WSC2-Compact-LS byte layout (rain-gauge configuration); expected.data computed by this codec. rain = 4-byte tip count x 0.2 mm/tip (DR-RG-6P) -> rain.cumulative; ambient temperature/humidity -> air.*; barometric pressure (device kPa) x10 -> air.pressure (hPa); illuminance -> air.lightIntensity. No TTN/upstream examples exist for this device; wire format per Dragino published decoder/manual.
fPort 5 carries firmware/band info, not a measurement.
